eng.definition: The quality or fact of being able to grip something firmly; grip.
examples: Her tenacity was admired by everyone.
His tenacity in pursuing his goals was impressive.
Despite the challenges, they showed great tenacity.

hin.definition: The action or process of studying or learning about something
examples: मैं अध्ययन करने का समय ढूँढ़ रहा हूं.
उसने अपने अध्ययन का समर्थन किया.
आपको इस विषय का अध्ययन करना चाहिए.
